attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway rider who capitalizes on early moves and holds power for explosive accelerations in final 300-500m. Willing to commit to long-range efforts.
team_tactics: Limited data on team support patterns. Appears willing to animate races through early aggression, potentially as protected rider or super-domestique depending on race context.
terrain_preference: Insufficient data to determine specific terrain preference. Success recorded on stage race finale, suggesting stage racing acumen and ability to survive multi-day efforts.
vulnerability: Early-race positioning appears problematic—crashed while attempting breakaway at Tour de France. Risk-taking in opening stages may expose him to incidents before key moments.
key_patterns: Actively seeks breakaway opportunities early in stages, willing to expend energy from start (2 instances)
Possesses finishing speed to convert late-race positions, effective under 500m to go (1 win)
Operates as Colombian champion with pressure/expectations in Grand Tour environments
form_trajectory: unknown: Limited recent data with 2-year gap between observations. Most recent result was stage win in 2022, but insufficient subsequent data to assess current trajectory.
